project.name: 社媒文案器 IDE
project.designRead: social media copywriting tool / shadcn dashboard / warm stone-orange light + neon-green dark
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Two-panel dashboard with shadcn-style components, orange(light)/green(dark) accent, accordion sections, sheet overlay audit panel.

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: Simple app bar: brand icon + title + mock badge + theme toggle
sharedProjectShellContract.primaryColorSystem: Light: orange #f97316 accent on stone-white; Dark: neon green #00ff00 accent on olive-black
sharedProjectShellContract.typographySystem: Noto Sans SC / PingFang SC / Microsoft YaHei, 12-14px body
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: Subtle shadow cards, 1px border, card-bg elevated from page-bg
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: Full-width primary button h-40px rounded-lg, outline secondary buttons

iconAssets.coloringRule: currentColor by default; override with Library token when needed
